mapper.select: select en_num, en_title, en_regdate, en_views, user_name from examNotice e inner join users u on e.user_num = u.user_num order by e.en_num desc

select en_num, en_title, en_regdate, en_views, user_name from examNotice e inner join users u on e.user_num = u.user_num
e.en_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
order by e.en_num desc

select count(*) from examNotice
en_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
select en_num, en_title, en_content, en_regdate, en_views, user_name from examNotice e inner join users u on e.user_num = u.user_num where en_num = #{en_num}
mapper.insert: insert into examNotice(en_num, en_title, en_content, en_regdate, en_views, user_num) values(#{en_num}, #{en_title}, #{en_content}, #{en_regdate}, #{en_views}, #{user_num})
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_EXAMNOTICE.NEXTVAL AS en_num FROM DUAL
